notes: Instrument lifecycle — Phase 1 (data model + engine + edit UI). EMIs and investments now support effective-dated lifecycle events: setAmount (step up/down), pause, resume, and close. Schema v11 adds an optional events[] array to each EMI/investment (backward compatible — instruments without events behave exactly as before). Engine: a shared resolveInstrumentTimeline() derives each month's contribution honoring the events; on an investment CLOSE, the full balance is redeemed into savings that month (flows through the unified projectSavingsChain as a one-time inflow) and the investment holds at 0 thereafter; EMIs can be closed early or stepped via setAmount. UI: each EMI/investment row in Edit my inputs gets a '⋯' Manage-timeline button opening a panel to schedule changes (type + effective month + amount). The button highlights when events exist. NOTE: Phase 1 still SHOWS closed instruments as 0 in future months — Phase 2 will hide all-zero rows, Phase 3 adds the Past/Current+Future/All time filter. Verified: close stops contribution + redeems balance, step-up raises contribution from the chosen month, pause/resume gaps then restarts.
